rationale: ONDO has a fixed hard cap of 10 billion tokens with no minting; 'inflation' is entirely driven by vesting unlocks releasing previously locked allocations into circulating supply. The unlock rate is heaviest in 2024–2025 and tapers as allocations fully vest by ~2028, so the circulating-supply growth rate will decline materially over the next 24 months.
caveats: ONDO total supply is fixed at 10B — no protocol-level inflation/minting exists.
The 0.19 rate reflects projected circulating supply dilution from vesting unlocks over the next ~12 months, not monetary inflation.
Exact unlock schedule granularity is NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER from official docs; figure is estimated from CoinGecko supply trajectory and publicly disclosed vesting categories.
Observed YoY from TGE (Jan 2024–Jan 2025) was ~125% but is unrepresentative due to low initial float at launch.
